violations.text: The 3-bay is lacking adequate stoppers. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

FOOD (hot hold items) that is available for CONSUMER shall be prominently labeled with the following information in plain view of the CONSUMER: 1. The common name of the FOOD, or absent a common name, an adequately descriptive identity statement; 2. If made from two or more ingredients, a list of ingredients in descending order of predominance by weight, including a declaration of artificial color or flavor and chemical preservatives, if contained in the FOOD 3.The name of the FOOD source for each MAJOR FOOD ALLERGEN contained in the FOOD unless the FOOD source is already part of the common or usual name of the respective ingredient. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

Establishment does have allergen statement poster located on pastry display. PIC removed pastries from display and will print allergy statements for each pastry product sold. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the retail and walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
Inspector observed ready to eat apples on display for consumers. RTE foods must be protected from contamination from consumers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
Handwashing machine located in the beverage area was not in good repair(observed leakage at pipes). New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation debris: 1.counters and cabinets under coffee equipment observed with food and soil residue, and other debris. 2.counters near beverage station observed with food residue and dried spillaged. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023

The following physical facilities is in poor repair 1.ceilings in back storage area (broken/ripped tiles). 2.ceilings in food prep area observed with water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The floors in the stockroom, walk in cooler, back storage have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris , and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
